title: Agent Integrity Event
description: Canonical event envelope for agent integrity telemetry across Tier 4 components.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this event schema. Additive-only within major 1. Consumers MUST reject major > 1.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event creation.

trace_id.description: Correlation trace identifier spanning multiple events and components.

component_version.description: Semantic version of the originating component.

payload.description: Component-specific event payload. Structure defined by event_type.

correlation_id.description: Optional correlation identifier linking related events within a session.

parent_event_id.description: Optional parent event identifier for causal chains.

tags.description: Optional key-value tags for indexing and filtering.

not.description: Reject unknown properties with unrecognized prefixes — treat as field reserved for future major.
